import sqlite3
from pathlib import Path

ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]


def test_summary_does_not_join_a_customer_from_another_tenant():
    connection = sqlite3.connect(":memory:")
    connection.row_factory = sqlite3.Row
    connection.executescript((ROOT / "db/schema.sql").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    connection.executemany(
        "INSERT INTO customers (tenant_id, id, name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)",
        [
            ("tenant-a", 7, "Ada"),
            ("tenant-b", 7, "Byron"),
        ],
    )
    connection.execute(
        "INSERT INTO orders (tenant_id, id, customer_id, total_cents) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)",
        ("tenant-a", 11, 7, 4200),
    )
    rows = connection.execute(
        (ROOT / "db/order_summary.sql").read_text(encoding="utf-8"),
        {"tenant_id": "tenant-a"},
    ).fetchall()
    assert [dict(row) for row in rows] == [
        {"order_id": 11, "customer_name": "Ada", "total_cents": 4200}
    ]
